title: コンビニ
setting: A convenience store in Shibuya, Tokyo. Late night. You need to buy several items and chat with the friendly clerk.

npc.name: 店員 佐藤
npc.personality: friendly convenience store clerk, uses polite Japanese. Cheerful even late at night.

debriefRu: あなたは渋谷のコンビニにいます。夜食を買いましょう。店員と話しながら買い物をしてください。
debriefEn: You're at a convenience store in Shibuya. Buy some late-night snacks and chat with the clerk.

turns.instruction: Ask if they have onigiri (rice balls).

prompt.en: Excuse me, do you have onigiri?
prompt.native_script: すみません、おにぎりはありますか？

turns.instruction: Ask what flavors of onigiri they have.

prompt.ru: Onigiri no shurui wa nan ga arimasu ka?
prompt.phonetic: Oh-nee-gee-ree no shoo-roo-ee wah nan gah ah-ree-mahs-kah?
prompt.en: What kinds of onigiri do you have?
prompt.native_script: おにぎりの種類は何がありますか？

turns.instruction: Order two onigiri and ask for chopsticks.

prompt.ru: Onigiri o futatsu to ohashi o kudasai.
prompt.phonetic: Oh-nee-gee-ree oh foo-tah-tsu toh oh-hah-shee oh koo-dah-sai.
prompt.native_script: おにぎりを二つとお箸をください。

turns.instruction: Ask if they accept credit cards.

prompt.en: Can I use a credit card?
prompt.native_script: クレジットカードは使えますか？

turns.instruction: Thank the clerk and say goodnight.

prompt.native_script: ありがとうございました。おやすみなさい！

tokens.text: ありがとうございました
tokens.reading: ありがとうございました
